name: Numeric Recomputed Deterministically (C2)
description: Capability C2 (Deterministic Numeric Computation): numeric results must be recomputed by a deterministic (non-LLM) calculator, not asserted by the model.
rationale: Szpruch C2 failure mode: silent numeric error with LLM plausibility masking the arithmetic error. Ratios and thresholds must be recomputed deterministically.

examples.passes: Compute with deterministic_recompute of the ratio
examples.fails: a P&L figure asserted by the model without deterministic recomputation

source: FIX AI WG — Proposal on Agentic AI Runtime Governance (Healey & Houston, 12 Jun 2026); governance conditions per Szpruch, Sudjianto, Bhatti & Ang (2026), 'Scalable Runtime Governance for Agentic AI in Financial Services'.
